_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL
name: Python (YuraCloud Pro)
author: dapaupau@sigaul.com
description: Pro-tier Python egg by YuraCloud. Optimized for performance, auto-dependencies, and full customization.
startup: if [ ! -z "${PRE_STARTUP_COMMAND}" ]; then eval ${PRE_STARTUP_COMMAND}; fi; if [ -d .git ] && [ "${AUTO_UPDATE}" = "1" ]; then git pull; fi; if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then pip install -q -r requirements.txt; fi; exec python ${PY_FILE}

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
apt-get update
apt-get install -y git curl ca-certificates

cd /mnt/server

if [ ! -z "${GITHUB_PACKAGE}" ]; then
    if [ -z "${GITHUB_PERSONAL_TOKEN}" ]; then
        git clone ${GITHUB_PACKAGE} .
    else
        git clone https://${GITHUB_USER}:${GITHUB_PERSONAL_TOKEN}@github.com/${GITHUB_PACKAGE} .
    fi
fi

if [ ! -f main.py ]; then
cat << 'EOF' > main.py
print("Hello from YuraCloud Python!")
import time
while True:
    print("Server is running...")
    time.sleep(60)
EOF
fi

# --- Auto-detect Region ---
DETECTED_REGION=$(curl -s http://ip-api.com/line?fields=country | head -n 1)
if [ -z "$DETECTED_REGION" ]; then DETECTED_REGION="Unknown"; fi

# --- Branding and Information ---
echo ""
echo "=================================================="
echo "                  YuraCloud                       "
echo "=================================================="
echo "Informasi Server:"
echo "UUID      : ${P_SERVER_UUID}"
echo "Region    : ${DETECTED_REGION}"
echo "Port      : ${SERVER_PORT}"
echo "Egg Type  : Python"
echo "=================================================="
echo "    Terima kasih sudah membeli di YuraCloud!      "
echo "=================================================="
echo ""

variables.name: Python Script File
variables.description: The main Python file to execute.

variables.name: GitHub Repository
variables.description: Optional: GitHub repository to clone (e.g., username/repo).

variables.name: Pre-Startup Command
variables.description: Custom commands to run BEFORE the main script (e.g., pip install psutil).

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Pull latest changes from git on startup if .git exists.
